ui.intro_text: This experience helps family members reflect on misunderstandings linked to communication and generational perspectives.
ui.privacy_text: Each participant responds independently. Inputs are personal perspectives and are not treated as objective truth. Responses are stored in structured form for comparison.
ui.privacy_decline_message: The interaction has ended because consent was not provided.
ui.ready_text: You can add another participant or continue to analysis.
ui.max_charts_note: Only the first {max_radar_charts} radar charts are displayed.

messages.participant_validation_error: Please complete all profile fields and all three answers.
messages.disengaged_input: Your input seems unrelated or not sufficiently engaged with the reflective questions. Please continue only if you are willing to engage meaningfully. AI processing consumes energy.
messages.no_participants: Add at least one participant before analysis.

questions.misunderstood: When did you recently feel misunderstood in your family, and what do you think happened?
questions.missing: What do you feel is missing in your family communication right now?
questions.wish: What do you wish others in your family could better understand about your perspective?

prompts.engagement_system_prompt: You are a strict validation assistant. Stay neutral and evaluate relevance and engagement only.
prompts.engagement_check_prompt: Evaluate whether the participant answers are relevant to the three reflective family questions and show meaningful engagement. Return only valid JSON with keys: is_relevant (boolean), is_engaged (boolean), reason (string). Participant metadata: role={role}, generation={generation}, family_role={family_role}. Questions: misunderstood={question_misunderstood}; missing={question_missing}; wish={question_wish}. Answers JSON: {answers_json}.
prompts.analysis_system_prompt: You are a neutral reflection mapper. Do not assign blame, advice, or judgment.
prompts.analysis_prompt: Map the participant text into the provided categories and return only valid JSON. Scale each category score from 0 to 10. Keep all keys exactly as provided. Also include extracted keywords (list of strings) and sentiment (number between -1 and 1). Participant metadata: role={role}, generation={generation}, family_role={family_role}. Questions: misunderstood={question_misunderstood}; missing={question_missing}; wish={question_wish}. Answers JSON: {answers_json}. Use these category templates exactly. Basic emotions template: {basic_emotions_template}. Derived emotions template: {derived_emotions_template}. Mental states template: {mental_states_template}. Relational needs template: {relational_needs_template}. Output schema: {"basic_emotions": {...}, "derived_emotions": {...}, "mental_states": {...}, "relational_needs": {...}, "keywords": [], "sentiment": 0.0}
prompts.external_comparison_prompt: Summarize the comparison between current family aggregate scores and historical aggregate scores in a neutral way. Return only valid JSON with keys: alignment (array of strings), divergence (array of strings), note (string). Current aggregate: {current_aggregate_json}. Historical aggregate: {historical_aggregate_json}.
